short: xAI's family of large language models and the chatbot of the same name.
definition: Grok is the family of large language models and chatbot built by xAI, available on the X platform and through an API. A distinctive feature is access to real-time posts from X, letting it answer questions about current events. It is positioned as a general assistant with a distinct conversational style, used for coding, research, and real-time information tasks.
